title: Current Location / 当前位置
area: Rain Alley (near Mira's Noodle Shop) / 雨巷（米拉面馆附近）
description: A narrow alley between crumbling residential blocks. Neon signs for noodle shops and repair stalls cast colored light across wet concrete. The air smells of synthetic broth and ozone.

exits.north: Main street — busier, more vendors, a public terminal
exits.south: Deeper alleys — darker, quieter, leads to residential blocks
exits.east: Mira's Noodle Shop — warm light, a woman watching from the counter
exits.west: Market square — open area, more people, more noise

points_of_interest: Mira's Noodle Shop (east) — A small, steamy establishment. The owner seems to be watching you.
Public Terminal (north, main street) — NEXUS-operated information kiosk. Free access.
Repair Stall (north) — Sells basic tools and electronics.
npcs_present: Mira (米拉) — Behind the counter of her noodle shop. Watching.
